attributes.description: Transaction outcomes and tablespace capacity. Are transactions succeeding? Are deadlocks occurring? Which tablespaces are growing?

embeddableConfig.content:
# Oracle Database - Transaction Health & Storage Management

This dashboard offers insights into transaction outcomes and storage capacity for the Oracle instance, including

- Commit and rollback throughput rates with rollback-to-commit ratio trending
- Enqueue and exchange deadlock detection and rate tracking over time
- Total storage consumption across all tablespaces
- Per-tablespace utilisation breakdown showing used bytes, limits, and percentage fill
- Tablespace growth trends over time for capacity planning

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits)), rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits)), rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Commit vs Rollback Rate Over Time

embeddableConfig.description: User commit and rollback rates per second plotted together over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS rb_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks)), c_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL total = c_rate + rb_rate
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total > 0, ROUND(rb_rate / total, 3), 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS rb_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks)), c_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL total = c_rate + rb_rate
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total > 0, ROUND(rb_rate / total, 3), 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Enqueue deadlock (table/row lock deadlocks between sessions) rate per second over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.exchange_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS exchange_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.exchange_deadlocks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.exchange_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS exchange_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.exchange_deadlocks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Exchange deadlock (index scan buffer exchange deadlocks) rate per second over time. These are internal, automatically retried events.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage), limit_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| EVAL utilisation_pct = CASE(limit_bytes > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(usage_bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_bytes), 3), NULL)
| SORT utilisation_pct DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage), limit_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| EVAL utilisation_pct = CASE(limit_bytes > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(usage_bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_bytes), 3), 0)
| SORT utilisation_pct DESC
| LIMIT 50

embeddableConfig.description: Per-tablespace breakdown showing used bytes, limit bytes, and utilisation percentage, sorted by utilisation descending.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Per-tablespace used bytes over time, with one series per tablespace_name.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit > 0
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage), limit_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(usage_bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_bytes), 3)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit > 0
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage), limit_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(usage_bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_bytes), 3)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Per-tablespace utilisation percentage over time, with one series per tablespace_name.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL
| STATS rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL
| STATS rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL
| STATS rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks))

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage_bytes)

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage_bytes)

embeddableConfig.description: Total bytes used across all tablespaces.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage_bytes)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS rb_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks)), c_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits))
| EVAL total = c_rate + rb_rate
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total > 0, ROUND(rb_rate / total, 3), 0)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS rb_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks)), c_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits))
| EVAL total = c_rate + rb_rate
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total > 0, ROUND(rb_rate / total, 3), 0)

embeddableConfig.description: Proportion of completed transactions that were rolled back rather than committed.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS rb_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks)), c_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits))
| EVAL total = c_rate + rb_rate
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total > 0, ROUND(rb_rate / total, 3), 0)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_delta = SUM(INCREASE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_delta = SUM(INCREASE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks))

embeddableConfig.description: Approximate count of enqueue deadlocks (ORA-00060) in the selected time range.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_delta = SUM(INCREASE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks))

attributes.title: [Metrics Oracle] Transaction Health & Storage Management
